hooks.command: python3 -c "import json,sys; data=json.load(sys.stdin); path=data.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path',''); blocked=['.env','.env.','secrets','credentials','.pem','.key']; sys.exit(2) if any(p in path for p in blocked) else sys.exit(0)"

python3 -c "import json,sys; data=json.load(sys.stdin); cmd=data.get('tool_input',{}).get('command',''); blocked=['cat .env','echo \$SUPABASE','echo \$STRIPE','echo \$ANTHROPIC','echo \$GOOGLE','echo \$DEEPGRAM','echo \$SENDBLUE','echo \$BROWSERBASE','echo \$COMPOSIO','echo \$AWS','echo \$WORKSPACE_JWT','printenv']; sys.exit(2) if any(p in cmd for p in blocked) else sys.exit(0)"

FILE_PATH=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | python3 -c "import json,sys; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get('file_path',''))" 2>/dev/null || echo ''); if [[ "$FILE_PATH" =~ \.(ts|tsx|js|jsx)$ ]] && command -v npx &>/dev/null && [ -f node_modules/.bin/prettier ]; then npx prettier --write "$FILE_PATH" 2>/dev/null; fi; exit 0

INPUT=$(cat); ACTIVE=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.stop_hook_active // false' 2>/dev/null); [ "$ACTIVE" = "true" ] && exit 0; REMAINING=$(jq '[.[] | select(.passes == false)] | length' .harness/FEATURES.json 2>/dev/null || echo 0); CURRENT=$(cat .harness/CURRENT-TASK.md 2>/dev/null || echo 'No task'); RETRY_FILE=.harness/.retry_count; RETRIES=$(cat "$RETRY_FILE" 2>/dev/null || echo 0); if [ "$RETRIES" -ge 3 ]; then echo 0 > "$RETRY_FILE"; echo 'Max retries (3) reached for current task. Add to FIX-PLAN.md and move to next feature.' >&2; exit 0; fi; if echo "$CURRENT" | grep -qi 'no task in progress' && [ "$REMAINING" -gt 0 ] 2>/dev/null; then echo $((RETRIES + 1)) > "$RETRY_FILE"; echo "There are $REMAINING features remaining in FEATURES.json. Pick the next one." >&2; exit 2; fi; echo 0 > "$RETRY_FILE"; exit 0
